leadText: The Dappled Grove (Japanese: こもれび林 Peeking Sunlight Grove) is a part of the Wild Area in the Galar region, located in the southwest of the southern portion of the Wild Area. It connects to Rolling Fields to its east, West Lake Axewell to its northeast, and Watchtower Ruins to its north.

sections.title: Geography
sections.text: Geography [ edit | edit source ] The Dappled Grove is a forested area running along the west wall of the Wild Area next to Lake Axewell. Many items lie hidden at the bases of trees here. Along the cliff wall running north from the southwest corner are two Berry trees, as well as two Pokémon Dens closer to the lakeside. A Watt Trader stands underneath a tree between the Berry trees. Further north along the cliff wall lie a pair of dens. Opposite these near the lake lie a third den and a Berry tree. One more Berry tree sits along the lakeside further north, closely marking the Dappled Grove's border with Watchtower Ruins .

sections.title: Watt Trader
sections.text: Watt Trader [ edit | edit source ] Main article: Watt Trader The Watt Trader is located at near a Berry tree in the east. His stock follows a schedule that changes daily, and always consists of one type of Poké Ball , a Wishing Piece , and five distinct TRs .
